_doc: Map any author email, github noreply login, or git committer name (all matched case-insensitively) to a canonical id (typically a GitHub login). The fetcher merges all matching identities into one row per canonical id. Copy to aliases.json and edit. To deduce logins, hit `gh api repos/<owner>/<repo>/commits/<sha> --jq .author.login` for any commit by an unknown identity.
